topStories.title: 'Deal Looking Very Good': Trump Says Iran Agreed To Give Up Nuclear Weapon Ambitions
topStories.description: The deal would also include "free oil" and an opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Trump added.

topStories.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
topStories.description: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

dailyNews.title: Senate vote on arms sale shows ‘massive cracks’ in US support for Israel
dailyNews.description: Rights advocates hail 'historic' shift as 40 out of 47 Democratic senators vote to block military bulldozers to Israel.

dailyNews.title: Cuban president defiant amid US pressure and energy blockade threats
dailyNews.description: Miguel Diaz-Canel marks anniversary of socialist revolutionary declaration under threat of US attacks.

dailyNews.title: US Says Lebanon Commits To Stopping Hezbollah Attacks On Israel
dailyNews.description: The US State Department said that the ceasefire reached between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday entails a commitment by Beirut to prevent any Hezbollah attacks.

dailyNews.title: Women’s Reservation Act 2023 comes into force: Gazette notification
dailyNews.description: It is not immediately known why the act was notified in the midst of the debate in Parliament to amend the same law; Congress terms the move “absolutely bizarre”

dailyNews.title: Trump claims Iran ‘agreed’ to abandon nuclear weapons, return enriched uranium
dailyNews.description: Trump struck an optimistic tone on negotiations, saying prospects for a deal were “looking very good” and progress was moving quickly.

dailyNews.title: World Cup 2026: Football fans outraged by United States transit prices
dailyNews.description: FIFA received backlash from high-profile US politicians, who feel the governing body should subsidise domestic transit.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Netanyahu, Aoun may meet at White House
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump said Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu and Lebanon's Joseph Aoun may meet at the White House.

dailyNews.title: Congress Suspends 5 MLAs Who Cross-Voted In Haryana Rajya Sabha Polls
dailyNews.description: The party's Disciplinary Committee had issued show-cause notices to the MLAs. Only two of the five MLAs appeared before the panel to submit their response.

dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV on Thursday criticised the "tyrants" ransacking the world, on a high-security visit to a "bloodstained" region of Cameroon following a war of words with US President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: 'Jee Lo Apni Zindagi': Kangana Ranaut's DDLJ Reference In Women's Bill Debate
dailyNews.description: BJP MP Kangana Ranaut on Thursday used a Bollywood reference to criticise the Congress party for questioning the government's decision to introduce a bill amending the women's reservation law.

dailyNews.title: Former lieutenant governor of Virginia kills wife and himself, police say
dailyNews.description: US officials believe the shooting related to the Democratic politician's ongoing divorce with Cerina Fairfax, a dentist.

dailyNews.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines
dailyNews.description: During a three-hour hearing, the US health secretary tried to focus on chronic disease while being pressed on vaccines.

dailyNews.title: 10-day Lebanon-Israel ceasefire announced by Trump
dailyNews.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire starting at 21:00 GMT on Thursday, said US President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: No date set for US-Iran talks, as Pakistan pushes to keep diplomacy alive
dailyNews.description: Pakistan's prime minister and army chief are both travelling to key players in the war, attempting to keep talks going.

dailyNews.title: Everything we like is a psyop
dailyNews.description: If culture is shaped by TikTok's algorithmic feed, then it's time for us to decide where we draw the line between necessary marketing and inauthentic growth hacking.

dailyNews.title: US general clarifies Iranian ports under blockade, not Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: A US general had to clarify that the US military is only blockading Iranian ports, not the entire Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Two Americans sentenced for helping North Korea steal $5 million in fake IT worker scheme
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Department of Justice announced that two Americans were sentenced to years in prison for helping the North Korean government place fake IT workers in U.S. companies.

dailyNews.title: Missing general, scientist deaths tied to secret US work prompt White House probe
dailyNews.description: Multiple scientists tied to U.S. military and defense research have disappeared or died, prompting questions about whether a broader pattern exists.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: GOP clashes over ‘skinny’ vs ‘obese’ DHS bill as Trump agenda looms
dailyNews.description: Congressional Republicans weigh a skinny reconciliation bill for DHS funding as senators clash over adding Iran war costs and other legislative items.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo slams those who 'manipulate religion' for military or political gain, Trump responds
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo denounced people who "manipulate religion and the very name of God for their own military, economic or political gain" during a Cameroon speech.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a ceasefire deal
dailyNews.description: In a post on social media, President Trump said that Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a ceasefire deal that will last for ten days and added that he will be inviting the leaders of both countries to the White House for talks. NBC News' Matt Bradley has details on the agreement and the ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.title: House effort to end Trump's war with Iran fails by one vote
dailyNews.description: The Republican-controlled House rejected a resolution ordering President Donald Trump to end the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Dr. Erica Schwartz, former deputy surgeon general, for CDC director
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced Thursday that he was nominating Dr. Erica Schwartz to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.

dailyNews.title: Drugmakers raised prices on hundreds of drugs despite Trump deals, report finds
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said his deals with drugmakers would bring down prescription drug prices in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump announces he's nominating Dr. Erica Schwartz for CDC director
dailyNews.description: CBS News reported​ Wednesday that Dr. Erica Schwartz was emerging as the president's top pick for the role.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge blocks above-ground White House ballroom construction
dailyNews.description: But underground construction work on a presidential bunker underneath the ballroom can continue, the judge said.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin set to launch tariff refund portal. Here's what to know.
dailyNews.description: A federal agency will open a portal on April 20 that lets businesses apply for a refund for Trump tariffs struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the leaders of Lebanon and Israel have agreed to begin a 10-day ceasefire starting at 5 p.m. Eastern.

dailyNews.title: Trump speaks on feud with Pope Leo, blockade on Iranian ports and more
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to reporters before leaving the White House on Thursday, addressing several topics from the war with Iran to his feud with Pope Leo XIV.
